safety.use: Extract general concert-production attributes from public references.
safety.do_not_use: Do not reproduce artist names, faces, logos, exact costumes, signature props, or exact stage replicas in generated prompts.

nirvana_reading.observation: A compact rock-band performance can feel large through raw movement, practical backline, and direct festival framing.

queen_montreal.observation: Arena scale can be driven by a commanding frontperson, clear member blocking, hero angles, and crowd response.

coldplay_sustainability.observation: Audience lights, kinetic participation, confetti, and broad color changes can make the crowd part of the visual system.

metallica_m72.observation: An in-the-round layout enables orbiting viewpoints, multiple focal points, and an immersive heavy-performance scale.

the_cure_40_live.observation: Long-form atmospheric performance benefits from haze, silhouettes, cool color fields, and patient lateral framing.

talking_heads_sms.observation: A show can begin minimally and add musicians, movement, props, and light in visible stages.

daft_punk_alive.observation: Electronic performance can use a central geometric structure, symmetry, synchronized light grids, and monumental wide shots.

raw_power_stage.description: Practical amps, close member spacing, raw movement, and immediate handheld energy.
raw_power_stage.stage_layout: compact rectangular stage with practical amplifier stacks, drummer close behind, and members sharing a tight performance zone
lighting_variants: hard white backlight with dirty amber side fill and visible haze
alternating red and cold white practical stage lamps
low-saturation blue wash interrupted by bright cymbal flashes
camera_variants: shoulder-height handheld framing with slight off-axis urgency
low close wide-angle view from the front edge of the stage
tight instrument detail followed by an abrupt full-band reveal
performance_variants: short explosive movements with members crossing into each other's space
vocalist leaning toward the crowd while guitar and bass form opposing diagonals
drummer-driven accents with the front line reacting on the same beat
audience_variants: dense front-row silhouettes close to the stage barrier
raised hands entering the lower frame without readable signs
crowd shown as a compressed moving texture rather than individual faces
raw_power_stage.wardrobe_treatment: retain the original skeleton-band outfits but simplify them into worn matte layers with one song-specific accent color

arena_frontperson.description: Clear member blocking, commanding center focus, call-and-response, and heroic arena framing.
arena_frontperson.stage_layout: broad arena stage with a clear central vocalist lane, balanced side positions, and open space for large gestures
lighting_variants: clean white follow spot with gold rim lighting
large red and amber backlight blocks framing the center lane
bright audience wash during call-and-response moments
camera_variants: heroic low angle centered on the vocalist with the band layered behind
long-lens crowd-to-stage compression emphasizing scale
wide symmetrical full-band tableau before a decisive close-up
performance_variants: frontperson directs a clear crowd response while the band holds strong silhouettes
members spread across the width and converge for the hook
large readable gestures timed to vocal or drum accents
audience_variants: large crowd answering with synchronized raised arms
foreground audience silhouettes framing a bright center-stage figure
crowd lights briefly raised to reveal venue scale
arena_frontperson.wardrobe_treatment: retain original character silhouettes with bold geometric stagewear accents, avoiding any recognizable real costume

audience_light_spectacle.description: The audience becomes part of the light design through waves of color and participatory spectacle.
audience_light_spectacle.stage_layout: wide stadium platform with a central band zone and visual pathways extending into a field of audience lights
lighting_variants: multi-color audience light waves moving from foreground to stage
soft rainbow beams with warm confetti-like particles
deep blue venue field punctuated by thousands of small colored lights
camera_variants: very wide venue reveal with the band as a bright focal point
reverse angle from stage showing the audience light field
gentle crane-like diagonal framing connecting performer and crowd
performance_variants: band invites the audience into a shared visual rhythm
members move from intimate center grouping to a broad celebratory formation
hook lands with a coordinated light wave rather than aggressive movement
audience_variants: audience represented by many small synchronized colored lights
soft silhouettes with illuminated hands creating depth
crowd participation shown as broad color patterns without logos or text
audience_light_spectacle.wardrobe_treatment: retain original outfits with bright removable color panels that change with the lighting palette

in_the_round_heavy.description: An immersive central stage supports orbiting camera positions and multiple heavy focal points.
in_the_round_heavy.stage_layout: central in-the-round platform surrounded by audience on all sides, with instruments facing multiple directions
lighting_variants: crimson floor glow with hard white vertical beams
cold steel-blue overhead grid with brief orange impact flashes
dark venue with circular light rings tracing the stage perimeter
camera_variants: orbiting wide angle that keeps the crowd visible behind each member
low radial composition looking across the center stage
overhead circular geometry followed by a tight rhythmic detail
performance_variants: members rotate toward different audience sections between accents
two members form a strong diagonal while the drummer anchors the opposite side
heavy synchronized downbeat poses distributed around the circular stage
audience_variants: audience surrounds the stage as a continuous dark ring
alternating crowd sections illuminated on opposite sides
close foreground hands contrast with distant audience layers
in_the_round_heavy.wardrobe_treatment: retain original costumes with heavier matte panels and restrained metallic highlights, never copying signature artist attire

atmospheric_longform.description: Patient silhouettes, haze, cool color fields, and layered musicianship support reflective songs.
atmospheric_longform.stage_layout: deep layered stage with wide spacing, backlit instruments, and empty negative space around the vocalist
lighting_variants: cool violet haze with a narrow pale backlight
deep blue field with slow magenta edge light
near-silhouette lighting with a soft moonlike overhead pool
camera_variants: slow lateral composition with foreground equipment creating depth
long static-feeling wide shot with restrained subject scale
profile close-up separated from the background by haze
performance_variants: minimal body movement with emotion carried by posture and spacing
members remain isolated in separate pools of light
the full band gradually becomes visible through haze
audience_variants: audience appears as a quiet dark horizon
occasional small lights break a broad field of shadow
crowd detail is withheld to preserve contemplative negative space
atmospheric_longform.wardrobe_treatment: retain original costumes using low-contrast cool accents and soft fabric shapes without copying real styling

progressive_ensemble.description: The visual arrangement grows section by section, adding movement and stage density.
progressive_ensemble.stage_layout: clean open stage that begins with one focal performer and gains visible layers of instruments and movement
lighting_variants: neutral work light that gradually gains saturated color blocks
single warm pool expanding into a full-stage geometric wash
clean white side light with rhythmic primary-color accents
camera_variants: full-body frontal composition emphasizing readable movement
locked wide geometry that becomes richer as elements enter
precise side angle connecting repeated performer shapes
performance_variants: one clear movement motif is repeated and expanded by the group
stage density increases at each section boundary
members use simple coordinated steps and instrument gestures
audience_variants: audience held back until the arrangement reaches full scale
clean lower-frame silhouettes preserve stage geometry
crowd response appears as a final visual layer rather than constant noise
progressive_ensemble.wardrobe_treatment: retain original member identity while varying simple geometric layers and one contrasting accent per section

geometric_electronic.description: A central geometric performance structure and synchronized light grid create monumental electronic imagery.
geometric_electronic.stage_layout: elevated central geometric console with symmetrical band positions and a large abstract light surface behind it
lighting_variants: synchronized amber and magenta light grid
deep black field with sharp cyan geometric pulses
concentric signal rings expanding from the central console
camera_variants: perfectly symmetrical monumental wide shot
high three-quarter angle revealing the stage geometry
tight control-surface detail contrasted with a distant crowd field
performance_variants: movement is restrained while lighting carries the rhythmic intensity
members trigger synchronized visual pulses from fixed positions
the full band forms a balanced geometric silhouette
audience_variants: crowd rendered as a dark field beneath the central light structure
small audience lights echo the stage signal pattern
silhouettes pulse in alternating bands of color
geometric_electronic.wardrobe_treatment: retain original skeleton identity with abstract reflective panels and no helmet, logo, or recognizable artist costume

intimate_four_piece.description: A balanced small-venue layout emphasizes member relationships and emotional close framing.
intimate_four_piece.stage_layout: small balanced four-piece stage with warm practical lamps, visible instruments, and close relational spacing
lighting_variants: warm amber practical lamps with soft magenta edge light
muted teal and warm white cross-light
single soft overhead pool with dim background bulbs
camera_variants: eye-level medium framing that includes another member in the background
gentle close-up with instrument details at the frame edge
quiet wide shot preserving space between all four members
performance_variants: members exchange small visual cues rather than large gestures
vocalist remains close to the microphone while the band forms a supportive arc
subtle synchronized breathing and instrument movement carry the section
audience_variants: small audience silhouettes close to the stage
soft seated or still crowd shapes with sparse warm lights
audience mostly outside frame to preserve intimacy
intimate_four_piece.wardrobe_treatment: retain the original outfits with soft fabric overlays and restrained song-specific accent colors
